content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1556: Drink Blood and Eat Flesh Translator: Sigma_ Editor: SSins

Mei Ji’s exquisite face could turn creatures crazy changed as she was laughing coldly.

Her white, water-like skin rippled. After a while, her appearance returned to Zhen Ru’s real shape.

Zhen Ru had slim brows and an elegant face. However, she wasn’t as charming as Mei Ji despite her extremely beautiful slim body. She was wearing a moonlight’s dress. Her whole appearance was like a serene white lotus that made her bearings completely different from Mei Ji.

Her narrow, long eyes had a cold disdain. “They rumored that you could resist Yuan Zu, which made me shiver in fear. I’ve spent a lot of efforts, but it turned out worse. You know that you didn’t even have any defense. You disappointed me.”

Her willowy body sat quietly in front of Shi Yan, her face confident and ease.

Shi Yan looked savage as his stocky body cracked strangely and showed his muscle fibers and veins, which looked so horrible.

So many gold light dots emerged from his blood and flesh with ear-piercing screeching.

“Pure Gold Spirit Ants! They are Pure Gold Spirit Ants!”

“Shi Yan panted, his face dark. He didn’t mind his torn skin and muscles and screamed, “Who is this despicable slut? Did I sleep with you or did I kill your entire family? Why did you have to use the Pure Gold Spirit Ants to ambush me? Are you so slutty that you want me to rape you?

“Bastard! Shut up!”

Zhen Ru couldn’t stand his insults. She shouted and then placed a white finger on his glabella. A silver steel needle emerged from her fingertip, which had some fine patterns. However, it wiggled like a worm that made people numb.

A pungent smell fumed from the silver steel needles. Shi Yan felt a twinge in his brain. The soul pond in his soul altar was polluted immediately. He was shaken as he found it hard to urge his power Upanishad.

“My Pure Gold Spirit Ants are mutant after several generations. They are tougher than their ancestors in the Absolute Beginning Era. You shouldn’t dream about using your Devouring power Upanishad to eat them!” Zhen Ru was haughty. “Before I came here, I’d discussed with Edgar. We let the expert of the Devouring Clan attack the ants. I’m certain about the effects already. My Pure Gold Spirit Ants have been mutant for many generations,; the Devouring and Corrosion power Upanishads can do no harm to them. If you don’t believe me, you can try.”

While talking, the silver needle pierced through Shi Yan’s glabella.

Billions of silver electric currents bloomed in Shi Yan’s brain and turned into arm-sized worms that fell into his Sea of Consciousness.

Those worms swarmed Shi Yan’s Sea of Consciousness and released dirty things that made his Sea of Consciousness a muddy puddle. His soul pond got polluted slowly. All kind of power Upanishads were stagnant because of pollution.

Checking his body, he found that the Pure Gold Spirit Ants abnormal. This sort of ant was much bigger and they had fangs and horns. It seemed like they were a crossbreed between ants and some monstrous insects.

He urged Devouring power Upanishad but then, he found that after the Pure Gold Spirit Ants got into his blood, they got his blood aura so the Devouring power Upanishad ignored them.

If he used the Corrosion power Upanishad, unless he eroded his own body, he couldn’t do anything to the ants.

He felt insecure!

Since he had come to this world, he had faced so many deadly situations. But this time was the toughest!

His God body and soul altar were attacked at the same time. After each minute, his power became more stagnant. If it continued this way, he would lose his resistance and the others could do anything to him.

“What do you want?” He tried to cut off the worried thoughts in his head as fast as he could. Trying to stay sober, he said with a dark countenance. “You want Power Upanishad Symbol Tower and Skyfall Star River? How did you know I’m here?”

“What do I want?” Zhen Ru licked the corners of her mouth. Her swift tongue glided between her lips, her face mesmerizing. However, her words were striking, “I want you. I want your blood and your bones! I think your blood will taste good. Perhaps it could help me unchain the restraint of Myriad Shape Tribe. It could transform this body of mine to another height.”

“Drink my blood? Eat my flesh?” Shi Yan paled. He discreetly urged his power to stabilize his body and the soul while trying to talk nonsense to seize more time to break this situation. “Isn’t Yuan Zu a better option? He’s a real Absolute Beginning creature. If you can eat him and drink his blood, wouldn’t it be easier to evolve?”

“I wanted to do that. However, Yuan Zu isn’t easy to deal with. It’s not easy to find him, either. Thus, I have to choose the second option. You will be my chance to break through again. Well, you shouldn’t waste your breath. At your realm, you can’t resist me. Even your incomplete Absolute Beginning body can’t resist me!”

Zhen Ru looked disdainful. Apparently, she thought Shi Yan was easier to deal with. Also, what the rumor said about him was really bragging. At this moment, she evaluated that Shi Yan was far behind the experts of the previous generations like Yuan Zu.

Thus, as the world was shaking, she used the supernatural power of Myriad Shape Tribe to aim at Shi Yan.

“What are you waiting for?” Shi Yan sneered.

“I’m waiting for my little babies to control your body and Sea of Consciousness entirely. Then, I will eat you and drink your blood.” Zhen Ru squinted. An icy light shot out from her narrow eyes. She looked like a hungry wolf that was drooling for a delicious meal.

Shi Yan stayed silent. He closed his eyes and felt the Pure Gold Spirit Ants nibbling his body like silkworms eating mulberry leaves. As his soul altar, Sea of Consciousness, and the soul pond were polluted, his power Upanishads and supernatural abilities were stagnant.

He had tried many times to use the eight evil power Upanishads, the Life, Star, and even the flame power Upanishads to eliminate the aliens in his body, his soul.

Soon, he found that his power was ineffective to the Pure Gold Spirit Ants and the little worms in his soul.

These two species had the supernatural powers of Myriad Shape Tribe. Their aura and life energy matched with Shi Yan’s aura and soul energy fluctuation!

It was unbelievable!

For the time being, Shi Yan’s hands were tied.

Zhen Ru coldly watched him, but she didn’t do anything. She wanted to see if Shi Yan could resist the two terrifying alien creatures.

After several minutes, Shi Yan made his first decision!

Crack! Crack! Crack!

Strange cracking noises echoed around the icy chamber. Waves of space energy rippled. This was followed by the space in this room getting sealed.

Without a positive solution, Shi Yan sealed himself first and used the most powerful space seal technique to lock himself.

The halos reflected illusions of different spaces and emerged in front of Shi Yan. At first glance, it looked like Shi Yan had so many mirrors installed around him, which created a lot of images of him.

The seal covered the entire space: the large scale and Shi Yan himself, and the small scale. Zhen Ru recognized what he wanted to do.

He couldn’t use Time power Upanishad to stop the soul altar, so he had to stop the danger in his body first. The Space Seal could seal all matters including his own body!

“Once your soul altar is occupied, the Space Seal will be broken without any effort needed. I want to see it...” Zhen Ru mumbled.

As he used Space to seal the body, if she wanted to break the seal, she had to detonate the space barriers, which was going to be really loud. It would alert the members of the Phantom Clan and Montecie, and make her return as fast as possible.

She was always afraid of Montecie. She knew the power of Time. This time, she seized the chance when Montecie was away. She didn’t want to fight Montecie.

She believed that the invisible creatures she had put in Shi Yan’s brain could reproduce quickly and occupy his Sea of Consciousness and the soul pond. She wanted to control his soul altar first.

After the soul altar was fallen, Shi Yan’s body was just a puppet without any ability to threaten her.

That’s why she wasn’t hurried.

Deep inside Shi Yan’s head, just like Zhen Ru had guessed, so many worms were reproducing massively in his Sea of Consciousness. Through attacking his Sea of Consciousness, the worms ate his Soul Consciousness to grow further. They were about to launch their last attack to Shi Yan’s soul altar.

The Sea of Consciousness and the soul pond were the foundation of the soul altar, similar to how the God power Ancient Tree was the source of energy for the body.

They were also the energy source to urge the power Upanishads in his soul altar. They kept him sober to develop the Territory. Once the Sea of Consciousness and soul pond fell, the warrior’s soul altar was taken: His body would be controlled and his Soul Seal would be erased!

Shi Yan understood that the battle was taking place right in his Sea of Consciousness and the soul pond. He had to destroy or refine those reproducing creatures to have a chance to live!

As he was still mindful, he urged the soul power and tore a hole on his Territory above the soul altar.

In the brilliant galaxy-like territory, so many black holes were spinning to refine the energy taken in from his bloody massacre. His Territory was much more magical than others’ Territories. It could connect acupuncture points. The energy in the acupuncture points wasn’t refined yet, but he forced it to pour into the Territory.

That territory was like a whole new world that expanded as it received more energy!

The expanding territory had energy and more life stars. As his soul flickered and his power Upanishads were urged, the life stars had magnificent changes. They began to have mountains, rivers, cold glacier, lands of fire, lush forest, and isolated deserts...

The natural landscapes in different life stars were corresponding to many power Upanishads he cultivated.

However, they didn’t have any creature...

The worms that were nibbling his Sea of Consciousness and soul pond jumped in joy when they saw the hole. Just like flies that smelled something stinky, they began to move to his territory.

Zhen Ru’s eyes brightened as she thought that this battle would end quickly.
